signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
This figure, confirmed by Statistics Korea and reported by Trading Economics, marks an increase from 2.0% in January and February 2026 but falls short of market forecasts of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid Middle East-driven energy volatility.[1]
